creator: markus@stoffdv.at
text:
I've created two pull requests at https://github.com/freebsd/pkg-plugins/pulls to update the examples for the current pkg(8) ABI/API for plugins. I feel this is still one of the first places people are looking at when learning how to write plugins.

Also, if you are looking for help to keep the examples up to date, I would be glad to volunteer. Just respond here or at https://github.com/freebsd/pkg-plugins/issues/4 .
